inline_comments.message: personally I'm not a fan if global values in this context but it's only my personal opinion

Thanks for your remark. I'd be happy to come with you to some agreement about it, as I'd like to follow up this change with a few more in the same manner 😊.
So, I was thinking about putting such vars into "global" in order to enable easy, onap-wide change for all the components that could use sdnc-oam contact point. If you prefer to define such vars on local scope of chart, please tell me why, so we could think about some good placement then 😊.

I've also doubled this information in main chart and subcharts so that subcharts could be deployed on it's own (not sure if particular components allow such functionality, but that's nothing bad, I think). This wasn't your concern I think, but it's safe to ensure.

So I'm not a fan of this solution but as you can see I gave + label so I'm fine to merge it as I don't have a better idea for now;)

The problem is very similar to the one with global variable in C. You can use them and in certain cases it's even recommended but this becomes nasty when you abuse them;)

When we migrate to service mesh we would have some better solutions as described here:
https://istio.io/blog/2020/multi-cluster-mesh-automation/

but we are defiantly not yet there so let's go with this as is until we have better idea or we run into serious issues with this approach.
